channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: kohilatas-experience
item.description: Source: TW Some of you have recently discovered me, whilst others have known me for a few years now. Many of you may be wondering where I had been and what I was doing, whilst others know me quite well. To get everyone on the same page, I thought it would be good to tell a little story. Emergency department In late 2019 and early 2020 I was asked to work front line in an emergency department to help with the “war effort”.
